tasks.name: verify_sdwan_sync
tasks.description:
[NRFU]: Verify All SD-WAN Edge Configurations Are In-Sync
------------------------------------
This job file verifies that all managed SD-WAN edge devices with an assigned system IP
have their configuration synchronized with the SD-WAN Manager using the REST API.

sections.name: VerifySDWANManagerEdgeConfigSync
sections.description:
[SDWAN-Manager] Verify All SD-WAN Edge Configurations Are In-Sync

    This test verifies that all SD-WAN edge devices with a configured system IP
    and that are managed (i.e., 'managed-by' != 'Unmanaged') have their configuration
    'In Sync'. Devices that do not have a 'configuredSystemIP' or are 'Unmanaged'
    are out of validation scope.

sections.name: setup
sections.description:
Setup method that extends the generic base class setup.

        Initializes the SDWAN Manager test environment by:
        1. Calling the parent class setup method
        2. Obtaining SDWAN Manager session data (jsessionid, xsrf_token) using
           cached auth

        Note: Client creation is deferred to run_async_verification_test() to avoid
        macOS fork() issues with httpx/SSL. Creating httpx.AsyncClient in a forked
        process before entering an async context can cause crashes on macOS due to
        OpenSSL threading primitives that are not fork-safe.

        The session data is obtained through the SDWANManagerAuth utility which
        manages session lifecycle and prevents duplicate authentication requests
        across parallel test execution.

sections.name: test_edge_config_sync
sections.description: Entry point - delegates to base class orchestration.

sections.name: SDWAN Edge Configuration Sync Status Verification

result.reason:
**SDWAN Edge Configuration Sync Status Check FAILED**

One or more managed SDWAN edge devices with a configured system IP do not have configuration status 'In Sync'.

**Validation Results:**
[FAIL] Device 'sd-dc-c8kv-01' (System IP: 10.0.0.1) configStatusMessage: Sync Pending
[FAIL] Device 'sd-dc-c8kv-02' (System IP: 10.0.0.2) configStatusMessage: Sync Pending
[FAIL] Device 'sd-br01-c8kv-r1' (System IP: 10.0.0.3) configStatusMessage: Sync Pending
[PASS] Device 'sd-br01-c8kv-r2' (System IP: 10.0.0.4) configStatusMessage: In Sync
[FAIL] Device 'sd-br02-c8kv-r1' (System IP: 10.0.0.5) configStatusMessage: Sync Pending
[FAIL] Device 'sd-br02-c8kv-r2' (System IP: 10.0.0.6) configStatusMessage: Sync Pending

**Detailed Failures:**
Device 'sd-dc-c8kv-01' (System IP: 10.0.0.1, Managed-By: Config-Group dc_hub): Attribute 'configStatusMessage' expected 'In Sync', found 'Sync Pending'
Device 'sd-dc-c8kv-02' (System IP: 10.0.0.2, Managed-By: Config-Group dc_hub): Attribute 'configStatusMessage' expected 'In Sync', found 'Sync Pending'
Device 'sd-br01-c8kv-r1' (System IP: 10.0.0.3, Managed-By: Config-Group branch_type1_primary): Attribute 'configStatusMessage' expected 'In Sync', found 'Sync Pending'
Device 'sd-br02-c8kv-r1' (System IP: 10.0.0.5, Managed-By: Config-Group branch_type2): Attribute 'configStatusMessage' expected 'In Sync', found 'Sync Pending'
Device 'sd-br02-c8kv-r2' (System IP: 10.0.0.6, Managed-By: Config-Group branch_type2): Attribute 'configStatusMessage' expected 'In Sync', found 'Sync Pending'

**Edge Configuration Sync Status:**
• Total checked devices: 6
• Devices 'In Sync': 1
• Devices out-of-sync: 5

**Please verify:**
• Devices have completed configuration push
• Devices are online and reachable
• No configuration push failures or errors
• Configuration groups/templates are correctly applied
• Device 'configStatusMessage' is not empty or in 'Out-of-Sync' state
• API query duration: 0.77s

sections.name: cleanup
sections.description:
Clean up test resources and save test results.

        This cleanup method is called after all test steps complete.
        It performs the following:
        1. Flushes and shuts down batching reporter (if enabled)
        2. Uninstalls step interceptors
        3. Saves collected results to JSON for report generation
